code_dossier.name: SendSMSResponse.java
code_dossier.description: SMS sending operation response DTO that extends BaseResponse to provide standardized response structure for SMS service API calls

data.detailed_description:
SendSMSResponse is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) class designed to encapsulate the response data from SMS sending operations in a third-party SMS service integration.

## Functional Overview
This class serves as a specialized response container for SMS sending operations. By extending BaseResponse, it automatically inherits:
- A `code` field (ToBCodeEnum type) for representing operation result status
- A `message` field (String type) for human-readable response messages
- Constructor methods for convenient instantiation

## Business Logic
The class currently acts as a marker/placeholder response type that:
1. Provides type safety for SMS-specific responses in the API layer
2. Enables future extension with SMS-specific response fields (e.g., messageId, deliveryStatus, sendTime)
3. Maintains consistency with the project's response pattern across different service operations

## Architecture Role
Located in the `third-party-api` module under the DTO package, this class serves as part of the API contract layer for third-party service integrations. It follows the standard response pattern established by BaseResponse, ensuring consistent API responses across the system.

## Design Pattern
The class follows the inheritance-based DTO pattern, leveraging Lombok's @Data annotation from the parent class to automatically generate getters, setters, equals, hashCode, and toString methods.
responsibilities: Encapsulate SMS sending operation response data with standardized structure
Provide type-safe response container for SMS service API calls
Inherit common response fields (code, message) from BaseResponse
Enable future extensibility for SMS-specific response attributes
Maintain API response consistency across third-party service integrations

interfaces.name: SendSMSResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class for SMS sending response, extends BaseResponse to inherit code and message fields with default and parameterized constructors
